title: Cold Water Boil Halal Empanadas
description: Buttery and light Venezuelan empanadas that are energizing and perfect for a quick breakfast or snack after boiling in cold water.

ingredients.name: Ground beef or vegetarian ground meat (optional)

instructions: Roll out the shortcrust pastry dough into sheets and cut into circles using a round cookie cutter or glass.
Place ground meat mixture in center of each circle, top with another circle of pastry dough and press down edges to seal.
Fold into quarters and place seam-side up on baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes until golden brown.
For a quicker option, boil the empanadas in cold water (around room temperature) for about 5 minutes or until fully cooked. Do not overcook as it can make them tough.
